task_objective: Land the vehicle gently at the target zone by minimizing horizontal error, vertical speed, tilt, and control effort while ensuring stable upright contact with both legs.

component_blueprint.name: target_proximity
component_blueprint.description: Reward horizontal closeness to target center

component_blueprint.name: altitude_progress
component_blueprint.description: Reward low altitude using exponential decay

component_blueprint.name: stability
component_blueprint.description: Reward small tilt angle and angular velocity

component_blueprint.name: control_cost
component_blueprint.description: Penalize main engine and side engine usage

component_blueprint.name: tilt_safety
component_blueprint.description: Extra penalty if tilt exceeds 0.5 rad

component_blueprint.name: landing_success
component_blueprint.description: Terminal reward for stable upright landing with both legs
component_blueprint.formula: reward 100 if left_leg_contact and right_leg_contact and abs(tilt_angle)<0.1 and abs(y_vel)<0.2

anti_exploit_principles: Use clipped and bounded rewards to avoid unbounded exploitation.
Prevent reward hacking by ensuring progress rewards require actual progress, not just abstaining from control.
Terminal reward condition must be strict to avoid rewarding crashes.
Safety constraints should dominate to discourage dangerous states.
